utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Note the painterly lines and subtle impasto on this canvas . Monet painted quickly and usually outdoors as his elusive subject was light itself .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Now , do you have any idea what you just said ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No , no , my mouth says the words , my brain is thinking monster trucks !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Ok now , remember , when you get to the museum , Monet is not spelt M ... O ... N ... A ... Y .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I wrote that out phonetically for you .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah , yeah that means ... you know ? We just ... we do not have time for this .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Ok , but you know what ? I gotta say , I am really impressed that you were able to memorize all this so quickly !

emotion_cause.span: 9_you were able to memorize all this so quickly !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Ah ! I am an actor ! I can memorize anything ! Last week on " Days " I had to say " Frontal temporal zygomatic craniotomy " .

emotion_cause.span: 9_I am really impressed that you were able to memorize all this so quickly !
10_Last week on " Days " I had to say " Frontal temporal zygomatic craniotomy " .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: But the guy I said it to dies in the next scene so I guess it means " you are gonna get eaten by a bear " .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Ok ! So let move on to the Renaissance ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Ok , Caravaggio uses chiaroscuro here to highlight the anguish of the central figure . Touch it , it is really bumpy ! .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Nah ah ! Nah ah ! No no no ! No ad ... libbing and dude , you can not touch the paintings .
